```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
};
```

```typescript
interface Config {
  host: string;
  port: number;
  debug: boolean;
}

function createServer(config: Config): void {
  const { host, port, debug } = config;
  console.log(`Starting server on ${host}:${port}`);
  if (debug) {
    console.log('Debug mode enabled');
  }
}
```

```typescript
class EventEmitter {
  private listeners = new Map<string, Set<Function>>();

  on(event: string, fn: Function): void {
    if (!this.listeners.has(event)) {
      this.listeners.set(event, new Set());
    }
    this.listeners.get(event)!.add(fn);
  }

  emit(event: string, ...args: unknown[]): void {
    this.listeners.get(event)?.forEach(fn => fn(...args));
  }
}
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```python
import asyncio

async def process_batch(items: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    tasks = [process_item(item) for item in items]
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    return [r for r in results if r is not None]
```

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str = 'viewer'
    active: bool = True

    def promote(self) -> None:
        self.role = 'admin'
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
};
```

```typescript
class EventEmitter {
  private listeners = new Map<string, Set<Function>>();

  on(event: string, fn: Function): void {
    if (!this.listeners.has(event)) {
      this.listeners.set(event, new Set());
    }
    this.listeners.get(event)!.add(fn);
  }

  emit(event: string, ...args: unknown[]): void {
    this.listeners.get(event)?.forEach(fn => fn(...args));
  }
}
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```typescript
async function fetchData<T>(url: string): Promise<T> {
  const response = await fetch(url);
  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
  }
  return response.json();
}
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
};
```

### DevOps: Advanced Techniques

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str = 'viewer'
    active: bool = True

    def promote(self) -> None:
        self.role = 'admin'
```

### Microservices: Common Pitfalls

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str = 'viewer'
    active: bool = True

    def promote(self) -> None:
        self.role = 'admin'
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str = 'viewer'
    active: bool = True

    def promote(self) -> None:
        self.role = 'admin'
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
};
```

```typescript
async function fetchData<T>(url: string): Promise<T> {
  const response = await fetch(url);
  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
  }
  return response.json();
}
```

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str = 'viewer'
    active: bool = True

    def promote(self) -> None:
        self.role = 'admin'
```

### Docker: Configuration

```typescript
interface Config {
  host: string;
  port: number;
  debug: boolean;
}

function createServer(config: Config): void {
  const { host, port, debug } = config;
  console.log(`Starting server on ${host}:${port}`);
  if (debug) {
    console.log('Debug mode enabled');
  }
}
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```typescript
async function fetchData<T>(url: string): Promise<T> {
  const response = await fetch(url);
  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
  }
  return response.json();
}
```

```typescript
class EventEmitter {
  private listeners = new Map<string, Set<Function>>();

  on(event: string, fn: Function): void {
    if (!this.listeners.has(event)) {
      this.listeners.set(event, new Set());
    }
    this.listeners.get(event)!.add(fn);
  }

  emit(event: string, ...args: unknown[]): void {
    this.listeners.get(event)?.forEach(fn => fn(...args));
  }
}
```

```python
import asyncio

async def process_batch(items: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    tasks = [process_item(item) for item in items]
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    return [r for r in results if r is not None]
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```python
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    email: str
    role: str = 'viewer'
    active: bool = True

    def promote(self) -> None:
        self.role = 'admin'
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
};
```

```sql
SELECT u.name, u.email, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE u.active = true
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

```javascript
const debounce = (fn, delay) => {
  let timer;
  return (...args) => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
  };
};
```
